q1_build_and_routes.question: Does the site still build cleanly and do all 5 role routes render with their structure + SEO intact?
q1_build_and_routes.answer: Yes. npm run build → exit 0, 155 pages (steady baseline held since S1). All 5 dist routes (educators/researchers/enterprise/startup-first-hour/compliance) emit a `.lede` element + a TechArticle jsonLD block + a meta description. No route lost a section or changed its path (IA + URL parity, AC #9).

q2_dead_css.question: Is there any dead or unused CSS left after the migration that should be removed?
q2_dead_css.answer: No. Only enterprise still carries a <style> block, and its `.eval-table` suite is fully referenced — `<table class="eval-table">` at line 78 plus 7 `<th>/<td>` elements covered by the `.eval-table th/td` descendant selectors. The other 4 pages have no <style> block at all. The `.lede` rule was already centralized into <PersonaPage> in S2 (0 residual in any page). Nothing to remove — evaluation-only cleanup.

q3_seo_parity.question: Is the SEO override matrix still correct and byte-for-byte after the cycle-138 component edit?
q3_seo_parity.answer: Yes — re-verified in built HTML: jsonLD description DIFFERS from meta description on exactly educators + enterprise (the two pages whose SEO description intentionally trims wording: educators drops ' for instructors'; enterprise compresses the clause list), and is byte-identical on researchers + startup-first-hour + compliance (no override). 2 override / 3 none — unchanged by cycle 138 (which touched only a doc-comment).

step_3_decide.change_selected: EVALUATION-ONLY — verification sweep confirms build green (155p), full IA/URL/SEO parity across all 5 routes, and NO dead CSS (enterprise .eval-table fully used; no other page styles). No file change this cycle. Record the build proof + cumulative line tally + override matrix.
step_3_decide.ceiling_declared: evaluation-only (no structural change); per skill_evaluation_only_disposition (M5.4 cycle 119 + M5.6 cycle 137 precedent)

step_4_implement.implementation_notes: No site files changed. Verification + tally cycle. Dead-CSS check confirms enterprise's .eval-table is fully referenced; no removals warranted. The other 4 pages have no local styles. The .lede + jsonLD boilerplate were already collapsed to the component in S1/S2.

step_7_record.iii_result: Cycle 139 complete (reference, evaluation-only). Full verification sweep: build green (exit 0, 155 pages, steady baseline since S1); source sweep clean (5/5 import PersonaPage once, 0 residual DocumentationLayout/seo imports / jsonLD const / .lede rule, only enterprise's single-use .eval-table <style> remains); dead-CSS check confirms .eval-table fully referenced (no removals); built-HTML sweep of all 5 routes confirms lede + TechArticle jsonLD + meta description present with the 2-override/3-none matrix intact byte-for-byte. Cleanup disposition: nothing to remove. S3 138-139 done; 140 = decadal close.
